Container.Name: bookorbit-db
Container.Overview:
PostgreSQL 18 + pgvector database for BookOrbit. This container has no web UI of its own - it exists purely to back the bookorbit container.
If you would like to use a custom Docker network to reach this database by its container name, go to Unraid terminal, enter docker network create bookorbit and then both bookorbit-db and bookorbit need to be attached to that network.
The POSTGRES_USER, POSTGRES_PASSWORD, and POSTGRES_DB values you set here MUST exactly match the values you enter in bookorbit.

Config.Name: Postgres User
Config.Description: Database username. Must match POSTGRES_USER in the bookorbit container.

Config.Name: Postgres Password
Config.Description: Database password. Must match POSTGRES_PASSWORD in bookorbit.

Config.Name: Postgres DB
Config.Description: Database name. Must match POSTGRES_DB in the bookorbit container.

Config.Name: PGDATA
Config.Description: Internal Postgres data directory inside the container. Leave as default.

Config.Name: Database Storage
Config.Description: Where Postgres stores its data files on the array/cache.
